summary: First end-to-end test of Soundlull. Backend (catalog, playlist, validation, determinism) all pass. Frontend full happy-path wizard (welcome → mood → intensity → duration → loading → audio player → feedback → completion → restart) all pass. Player controls (play/pause, next, prev, queue, volume, mute, exit) clickable without errors. Wizard progress bar visible on expected steps. No critical issues found.

integration_issues.issue: After clicking data-testid='next-track-button' the data-testid='current-track-title' text did not change from 'Dusk Over Still Water'. Same after clicking prev. This may be expected behavior (title updates only after audio metadata loads) or a real bug where the active-index state is not updated immediately. Worth a quick verification by the main agent: clicking next on a 2-track playlist should immediately update the displayed title.

action_items: Verify next-track-button actually advances current-track-title immediately on click (not only after audio metadata loads). For a 10-min session there should be 2 tracks and clicking next should change the title.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py: uses deprecated @app.on_event('shutdown'); consider FastAPI lifespan context manager (non-blocking).
server.py: CORS allow_credentials=True with allow_origins='*' is technically invalid per CORS spec (browsers reject credentialed requests with wildcard). Currently OK because no credentials are sent.
Frontend Soundlull.jsx: error toast shows 'Could not reach the calm' but no retry button; user has to refresh the page if /api/catalog fails on first load.

success_rate.frontend: 100% happy-path steps passed; 1 minor behavioral question on next/prev title update

test_credentials: N/A — no auth in this app
seed_data_creation: None required (catalog is static; playlist is generated deterministically per request).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/test_soundlull_api.py and cover catalog counts, playlist happy path, determinism (same input → same tracks/urls/titles, session_id differs), and 400s for invalid mood/intensity/duration. Frontend uses these data-testids confirmed working: welcome-begin-button, mood-card-{id}, mood-next-button, intensity-option-{id}, intensity-next-button, duration-option-{N}, duration-start-button, loading-screen, audio-player-screen, current-track-title, play-pause-button, next-track-button, prev-track-button, queue-toggle-button, queue-list, volume-slider, mute-toggle-button, player-exit-button, feedback-screen, feedback-option-{id} (5 options), feedback-submit-button, completion-screen, restart-session-button, wizard-progress. Restart returns to MOOD step (not WELCOME) — matches Soundlull.jsx restart() implementation.
rca of the issue: N/A — no failing tests. Only one behavioral question regarding next/prev track title update timing in AudioPlayer.
